function.message: I reviewed the next inbound note and could not complete it as requested because one of the explicitly listed OCR target files does not exist in the workspace. I processed the request up to verification and made no edits, so the inbox item remains untouched pending clarification/correction of the missing file reference.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied mandatory identity bootstrap, read nested AGENTS/workflows/schema before task work, followed explicit-file-list precedence from inbox item, and avoided partial mutations when one required input was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request specifies an exact 5-file OCR set in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md. Only 4 of those files were readable; the remaining listed target could not be read and follow-up search returned no match in the purchases directory, so completing the exact set would require substitution/guessing, which is not allowed.
